speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai
text: Subah se aankhon ke aage andhera chha gaya hai aur main yahi metro station pe baith kar rone laga hoon. Dimaag bilkul blank hai, bhai. Main aage ka kuch soch hi nahi pa raha, bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Address mild risk with normalising line, then mirror the feeling of emotional overwhelm without asking for the stressor yet.
text: Aisa andhera chha jana aur rona aana bilkul swabhavik hai jab andar bahut zyada ghabrahat jama ho jaye. Tum is waqt is bheed bhare metro station mein bilkul akele aur sunn mehsoos kar rahe ho, aur main sun raha hoon ki yeh panic kitna gehra hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan bhai, Dilli ki is bheed mein mujhe achanak kuch dikh nahi raha aur samajh nahi aa raha main kahan jaun. Saans lene mein dikkat ho rahi hai aur andar hi andar bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the physical duration and weight of the panic to deepen exploration.
text: Subah se lekar abhi tak is ghabrahat aur saans phoolne ke bojh ko akele sehna sach mein bahut lamba aur thaka dene wala lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan toh hogi hi. Subah subah mobile pe notification aaya tha EMI bounce hone ka... usne meri halat aisi kar di. Papa ke operation ke liye gaon paise bhejne the, par is mahine meri saari savings wiped out ho gayi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gently inquire about the implied fear connected to the newly introduced stressor.
text: Achanak se aaye is naye EMI notification aur savings khatam hone ki wajah se, kya ab gaon mein papa ke ilaaj ko lekar koi gehra darr baith gaya hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai
text: Darr hi toh hai bhai. Gaon remittance nahi jayega toh unka aage ka kya hoga? Mujhe rasta nahi dikh raha, bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai, aur main yahan shehar mein akele ghut raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of having no money left for survival or the operation.
text: Paisa na bhej paane ki wajah se gaon mein kya asar padega, aur papa ka zaroori ilaaj kaise poora hoga, yahi aage ka darr tumhe is akelepan mein kha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek toh yahan Dilli ka mehanga kharcha, upar se ghar ki poori zimmedari mere hi kandhon pe hai. Main koi solution nikalne ya bank se baat karne ke layag mehsoos nahi kar raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame of managing the family in the village and surviving in the city simultaneously.
text: Ek bete ke taur par gaon ki zimmedari uthane aur yahan is bade shehar mein apna guzara karne ka yeh jo poora bojh hai, usne tumhe puri tarah gher liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh itna hai ki ab uthaya nahi jaa raha. Par ghar pe bata bhi toh nahi sakta ki meri aisi halat ho gayi hai. Unhe lagega shehar aake beta fail ho gaya, kuch nahi kar paaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue and relational burden with a soft pause, without questioning.
text: Ghar walo ki ummeedon ke aage apni is pareshani aur darr ko andar hi andar chupana pad raha hai taaki unhe nirasha na ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, yahan station pe kitni bhi bheed ho par andar se bahut akelapan lagta hai. Pata nahi is musibat se kaise niklunga, thak gaya hoon ab akele yeh sab sehte sehte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the hidden exhaustion and isolation of enduring this heavy duty alone away from home.
text: Lagta hai ghar se itni door akele kamaane aur sabhi ko sambhalne ki is daud mein, andar hi andar tum poori tarah se thak chuke ho aur akela mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gaya hoon aur ghabrahat bhi hai. Agar naukri pe asar pada ya bank wale piche pad gaye toh gaon mein aur doston mein muh dikhane layag nahi rahunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his fear and exhaustion as normal given the systemic crushing weight of urban expenses and rural medical debt.
text: Tumhara yeh darr aur thakan mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai. Jab shehar mein akele EMI ka bojh aur gaon mein beemari ka kharch ek saath aa jaye, toh aisi bechaini hoti hi hai, par is achanak aaye financial bojh mein tumhari koi kami ya galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Galti bhale na ho bhai, par papa ka operation toh waqt pe karwana hi padega na. Uske bina toh main waise bhi kabhi chain se nahi so paunga yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic migrant anecdote normalizing the hidden burden of debt and izzat.
text: Apne ghar walo ke ilaaj aur remittance bhejne ke chakkar mein aisi mushkil aana humare bahar kaam karne wale bhaiyon mein bahut common hai—sirf tumhara akele ka nahi, lekin koi ispe khul ke baat nahi karega kyunki sab apni izzat aur gharwalo ki khushi bachana chahte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai bhai, sab andar hi andar is dard ko sehte hain. Par ab is bheed mein rone se kaam nahi banega, papa ka ilaaj zaroori hai. Batao main ab aage kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 small physical grounding options executable immediately at the station.
text: Abhi hum aage ke bade raste nahi sochenge, bas aane wale 10 minute ke liye inme se koi ek chuno—kya tum is bheed se nikal kar metro station ke bahar thodi hawa mein jaa sakte ho, ya station par hi kahin aaram se baith kar paani pi sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani toh bottle mein hai mere paas. Main metro ke exit gate ki taraf hi jaa raha hoon abhi, wahan bahar chhaon mein thodi der khada ho jata hoon bheed se door.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guide the step-by-step action to help him physically ground himself outside.
text: Pehle dheere dheere is bheed se nikal kar exit gate ke bahar jao... phir wahan thodi khuli hawa mein aaram se do ghoont paani piyo... bas itna hi aaj is waqt ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahar aa gaya hoon main. Khuli hawa thodi lag rahi hai toh kaanpna aur rona ruk gaya hai. Dimaag mein abhi bhi EMI ki baat chal rahi hai par wo pehle jaisa gehra sadma thoda kam hua hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe to alleviate his personal shame around financial distress.
text: Medical emergency aur aspatal ke achanak aaye kharchon ki wajah se savings ka wipe out hona ek bade financial system ka hissa hai. Yeh aisi koi cheez nahi hai jisme ek kamanewala beta personal level par fail ho gaya ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh baat toh sach hai, health insurance hota toh shayad aaj main aisi halat mein nahi hota. Par pichli chhuttiyon mein dekha tha, unhe aaram nahi tha. Bas papa theek ho jayein yahi fikar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his deep relational tie to his father returning to the foreground.
text: Tumhari saari fikar ghoom phir kar papa ki sehat par hi aati hai, jo dikhata hai ki unse tumhara kitna gehra lagav aur pyaar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lagav toh hoga hi bhai, unhone hi mehnat karke mujhe yahan tak bheja hai gaon se. Bas ab thoda sambhal kar us remittance ka intezam kaise karunga, wahi sochna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his return to the duty of a capable son trying to find solutions.
text: Apne bete hone ka farz nibhane ke liye ab tum us pareshani se uth kar, paison ke intezam ke bare mein phirse vichar karne ki taqat juta rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main thodi der mein bank ke customer care ko call kar ke dekhta hoon. Shayad meri poori halat sun kar wo mujhe EMI par thoda waqt ya extension de dein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his proactive step to handle the bank issue with courage.
text: Ghabrahat se nikal kar khud se bank walo ko call karne ka yeh chhota par thos faisla karna, tumhari bahut badi himmat ka saboot hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh ab karni hi padegi bhai. Yahan akele pardes mein aur koi doosra option thodi hai mere paas rone ke alawa.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his ability to move forward despite the long duration of distress today.
text: Is lambe din mein itni achanak aayi mushkil ka samna karne ke baad bhi, tumne aage badhne aur ladne ka hi raasta chun liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raasta ek hi hai humare paas. Ab office pohochna hoga, double duty karke fir se savings start karni padegi. EMI aur aspatal dono toh abhi sath chalenge hi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reiterate that the fear is specific to the consequence of debt, not a lack of strength.
text: Us aane wale EMI ke karz aur aspatal ke kharch ka darr abhi puri tarah khatam na hone ke bawajood, tum use poori zimmedari se handle karne ke liye tayar ho rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tayar hi hoon bhai. Shukriya aapne mujhe us waqt thoda sahara aur samay diya jab main poori tarah gir chuka tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect on his shift from feeling drowned to feeling capable.
text: Shuru mein jo woh bechaini ekdum se haawi ho gayi thi, uske shant hone ke baad wali saans sun kar mujhe bhi bahut tasalli mil rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan, abhi dimaag pehle jaisa blank nahi hai. Ekdum se jo andhera chha gaya tha aur lag raha tha ki bas ek gehra panic mehsus ho raha hai, wo ab clear lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on why his body shut down in panic.
text: Jab achanak se dimaag par kisi darr ka bojh apni limit se zyada badhta hai toh body aur mind ekdum shut down kar lete hain thodi der ke liye, taaki us bhaari stress ko sambhal saken.

speaker: Seeker
text: Achha, shayad isiliye main wahan station ke beech baith ke bas rone laga tha, par chalo koi baat nahi. Ab office pohochna hai, late nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with a warm validation of his resilience and an open door.
text: Apni shift par wapas jaane ka aur himmat na haarne ka yeh jazba sach mein kabile tareef hai, hamesha yaad rakhna ki gaon walo ke liye aur is shehar ki lambi mehnat mein tum bilkul akele nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Yahan is anjaan shehar mein akele baith kar mere haath-pair kaanp rahe hain... samajh nahi aa raha mere sath aage kya hoga. Bas ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon. Aisa lag raha hai har raasta band hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feeling of emotional overwhelm and paralysis without rushing to find the specific problem.
text: Jab itni door akele hote hain aur ghabrahat achanak haavi ho jati hai, toh sach mein dimaag poori tarah blank aur sunn mehsoos karne lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Haan bhaiyya, andar se ekdum khali aur akela lag raha hai. Language gap ki wajah se yahan Bangalore mein main apni pareshani kisi ko samjha bhi nahi sakta. Bas ghut raha hoon andar hi andar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the isolation and the barrier of communication making the burden heavier.
text: Bina kisi apne ke aaspas aur aisi anjaan bhasha ke beech jahan dil ka dukh baantna mushkil ho, ye akelapan is ghabrahat ko aur bhaari kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj subah achanak EMI bounce hone ka message aaya aur mere paas ek rupiya nahi bacha. Mummy ke hospital bills bharne ke liye gaon ki zameen bechna pada aur chit fund se bhi loan liya tha. Agar gaon mein logo ko pata chala ki main kist nahi de pa raha toh kya izzat reh jayegi hamari.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma protocol applied: mirroring the fear of social exposure softly and pausing without a question.
text: Ek taraf EMI bounce hone ka stress aur doosri taraf gaon mein biradari ke beech izzat kam hone ka darr, isne tumhe aur bhi nichod diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Ye ek ajeeb sa debt spiral ban gaya hai jo khatam hi nahi ho raha. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai mehnat karna bekaar hai, aur phir wahi ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting the Seeker to explore their internal narrative during these moments of paralysis.
text: Aise akele is karz ke jaal mein jab poori tarah sunn pad jate ho, toh andar hi andar us waqt khud se kya baatein chal rahi hoti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Khud se yahi kehta hoon ki kitna bada failure hoon main. Apni family ke liye hospital ka poora kharcha bhi theek se nahi utha paya aur upar se zameen gawa di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the deep exhaustion and unacknowledged grief of losing village ties and carrying this burden alone.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki lagatar apni family ko bachane ki jaddojahad aur pyari zameen chhutne ke baad ek bohut gehra exhaustion tumhare andar baith gaya hai, jise tum sabse chhupa kar utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan yaar, sach mein bohut thak gaya hoon. Har mahine EMI dekhna, chit fund walo ka pressure... meri umar abhi kam hai par dimaag pe bojh pachaas saal wale aadmi ka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the Seeker's immense exhaustion and separating their worth from the systemic medical and financial crisis.
text: Itni kam umar mein gaon chhod kar akele doosre shehar mein apni mummy ka medical aur poora financial bojh uthana kisi ko bhi thaka sakta hai. Tumhari thakan poori tarah jayaz hai, aur ye halaat mehenge hospital system ki wajah se bane hain, tumhari kisi kami ki wajah se nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par gaon mein log wahi sochte hain na ki shehar jaa kar paisa uda raha hoga. Agar kist bounce hoti rahi toh bank wale wahan gaon jayenge aur meri maa ko tension hogi. Ye soch kar hi darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the implied fear of their mother being disturbed by recovery agents.
text: Bank walon ka achanak gaon pahunch kar mummy ki beemari mein unko pareshan karne ka jo khayal hai, wo sabse zyada bechain kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main mummy ko tension mein nahi dekh sakta. Unki dawaiyon ke liye hi toh sab daaw pe lagaya tha. Is akela pan aur debt mein lagta hai jaise zindagi atak gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic anecdote to reduce isolation and frame this struggle as common among rural migrants.
text: Hamare desh mein, khaas kar jo log gaon se migrant bankar aate hain, unke liye aise medical emergency ke baad karz ke jaal mein phasna bohut common hai — sirf tumhare sath nahi ho raha, lekin koi bahar walo se bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat sunkar sach mein thodi tasalli mili ki main akela fail nahi hoon isme, bas halaat hi aise ho gaye. Par samjh nahi aa raha ki is hafte is bank wali situation se nipatne ke liye ab kya karoon? Koi raasta hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, doable actions to regain a sense of control without adding overwhelming tasks.
text: Agar tum chaho toh abhi panic rokhne ke do chhote kadam le sakte hain: ya toh bank ke support email par apni halaat likh kar time maangne ka ek message draft kar sakte ho, ya phir bas paper par is hafte ke sabse zaroori kharche likh sakte ho dimaag ka bojh nikalne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Email draft karna theek rahega, kyunki language gap ki wajah se customer care pe baat karna mushkil hota hai yahan. Pehle toh bas ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon jaisa feel ho raha tha, par ab thoda aage badhne ka mann kar raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding the Seeker step-by-step to start drafting the email to the bank.
text: Pehle ek blank email app kholo apne phone mein… phir usme bas apna loan number dalo aur ek simple line likho ki medical reason se is mahine EMI delay hogi… bas itna hi draft save kar lo aaj dimaag halka karne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Phone nikal liya hai maine. Hindi mix karke thoda likh diya draft mein. Par kya sach mein bank wale thoda waqt dete hain aisi beemari aur karz ki situation mein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassuring them with factual systemic information about banking provisions for medical emergencies.
text: Aise retail loans mein bank ke paas aksar penalty hata kar ya loan restructure karke thoda time dene ka option hota hai, khaas kar jab customer khud samne se email karke apne genuine medical reason ki jankari deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye maloom nahi tha mujhe. Chit fund walo ke daily dabav aur unki dhamkiyo ke darr se laga bank bhi waisa hi pressure dalega aur seedha gaon pahunch jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring how past traumatic experiences with informal lenders carry over to formal ones.
text: Itne mahino se jo an-official chit fund ka darr aur dhamkiyan jheli hain, us wajah se formal bank ko lekar bhi achanak waisi hi ghabrahat hona laazmi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhaiyya, chit fund wale toh izzat utaar dete hain. Par ab bank ka ye email draft poora ho gaya, thoda dimaag se bojh halka lag raha hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the Seeker's proactive role as a protector of the family.
text: Ye chhota sa mail draft karke tumne as a responsible beta apni maa aur parivar ko aage ki fikar se bachane ke liye ek samjhdaari ka kadam uthaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Mummy ko main is sab ki bhinak tak nahi lagne dunga. Unhe lagta hai unka beta shehar mein set hai. Jab tak mujhme himmat hai, main unko tension free hi rakhunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the source of strength that keeps them going despite the odds.
text: Apni maa ko saari pareshani se door aur tension-free rakhne ki ye jo gehri zidd hai, ye tumhe is akelepan mein har roz uthne ki taaqat kis tarah deti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Unki theek hoti hui health aur muskurahat dekh kar hi lagta hai ki gaon se yahan aana safal ho gaya. Jab dawai ke paise bhejta hoon toh mehnat wasool lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep relational tie that acts as a buffer against isolation.
text: Maa ki theek hoti sehat aur unki muskurahat hi tumhare liye wo sabse badi wajah hai, jo is anjaan shehar ke akelapan ko bhi chhota bana deti hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, theek kaha aapne. Waise bhi mere gaon ke do-teen aur ladke Bangalore mein hi kaam karte hain. Main soch raha hoon kal shaam unse mil kar thoda baat karun is kist wali problem pe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational reach-out to peers from their village.
text: Apne hi gaon ke un doston se mil kar yahan dukh-dard aur samasya baantne ka khayal is akelepan ko todne mein ek aur support lag raha hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Un ladko pe thoda bharosa hai mujhe. Unhone bhi shuru mein language gap face kiya tha yahan. Shayad wo mujhe koi raasta dikha de ya himmat de dein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their decision to connect with trusted peers for practical and emotional help.
text: Apne bharosemand doston se madad aur salah maangne ke baare mein sochna sach mein ek bohut samajhdaari ka faisla hai. Akele sab kuch jhelne ke baad ab is connection ki taraf badhna tumhari himmat ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon
text: Thank you bhaiyya meri baatein sunne ke liye. Pehle wo jo ek flood of emotions hai jisme main poori tarah sunn ho gaya hoon jaisa lag raha tha, wo baadal ab chhat gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from being completely overwhelmed and frozen to finding clarity and calm.
text: Wo jo achanak se sab band aur bilkul sunn lagne laga tha, us ghabrahat ki jagah ab ek thehrav aur theek se soch paane ki taaqat ne le li hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur maine plan kar liya hai ki kal office mein manager se baat karke is mahine ke liye thoda extra overtime ki demand karunga taki EMI set kar sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the strategy of overtime as a practical approach used by many in similar economic situations.
text: Overtime aur extra shifts ke jariye apni aamdani badhane ka plan aise temporary financial dabav ke time par bohut saare migrant professionals use karte hain situation ko aage se handle karne ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas kal doston se milunga aur overtime try karunga. Bhagne se toh karz theek nahi hoga na, aage badh kar larrne ka hi raasta bacha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing the conversation by honoring their resilient duty frame and readiness to fight.
text: Halaat ki is gehrai ko samajh kar bina thake apni family ki behatari ke liye ek baar phir se larrne ka tumhara ye irada sach mein bohut mazboot hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Rone ka control nahi ho raha yaar... ekdum sunn ho gaya hoon aaj. Bas ek gehra despair hai andar, aisa lag raha hai ki saans nahi lene de raha. Dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya hai, bilkul blank feel kar raha hoon, samajh hi nahi aa raha achanak se kya ho gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the physical sensation of despair and overwhelm (Lens F) without rushing to the problem, applying high risk protocol.
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise andar itni ghutan ho rahi hai ki theek se hawa bhi nahi aa rahi. Aise achanak dimaag ka blank pad jana aur saans ka atakna bohot darawna ho sakta hai. Kya tum abhi aisi jagah par ho jahan tum safe mehsoos kar rahe ho? Agar yeh bechaini sehna mushkil ho raha ho, toh iCall 9152987821 par aap abhi kisi se baat kar sakte hain, aur main bhi yahan bilkul tumhare sath hoon.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Main apne PG ke room mein akela baitha hoon, safe hoon... par dimaag phat raha hai. Aisa lag raha hai sab kuch ek jhatke mein khatam ho gaya. Bas rone ka control nahi ho raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D (duration/time) to mirror the weight of the moment and following moderate risk protocol.
text: Is akelepan mein jab achanak sab khatam hone ka khayal dimaag par itna haavi ho, toh ek ek pal kaatna kitna lamba aur bhari lagne lagta hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek kaise rahun bhai... medical expense spiral ne humein road par la diya hai aur aaj subah bank ka EMI bounce ho gaya. Main bas screen ko takta reh gaya, mera account balance zero hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a warm normalizing line for mild risk flag, then mirroring the feared consequence (Lens E).
text: Aise achanak paise ki pareshani aana kisi ka bhi dil bitha sakta hai. Screen par woh zero balance dekh kar aage ke guzaare aur is bounce hue EMI ke anjaam ka darr bohot dara deta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: EMI aur job ka darr nahi hai... darr is baat ka hai ki gaon mein kisan baap ko kya mooh dikhaunga. Unhone itni umeed se bheja tha padhne. Rone ka control nahi ho raha ye soch kar ki log kya kahenge jab sachai bahar aayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty and role-based pressure (Lens B) of being a son to a farmer.
text: Ek bete ki tarah parivaar ko support karne ka jo farz tum par hai, usmein aise rukawat aane par baap ki umeedon ke tootne aur gaon walo ke taanon ka bojh abhi bardasht karna bahut mushkil ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan yaar, papa ne kheti ki kamayi meri IT ki padhai mein laga di thi taaki main shehar mein set ho jaun. Ab jab unhe zarurat thi, yeh aspatal ka kharcha aa gaya aur ab EMI fail... sab ulat gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational aspect of the father's sacrifice versus the current crisis (Lens C).
text: Papa ki itni saalon ki mitti ki mehnat aur unka woh sacrifice jab samne aata hai, toh lagta hai ki apni is corporate job aur career se unka woh karz chukana achanak se kitna bhari pad gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main unhe kaise bataun? Agar bataunga ki EMI fail ho rahi hai toh society mein meri koi izzat nahi bachegi. Akele room mein ghut raha hoon kyunki kisi se help mangunga toh sab mazaak udayenge ki shehar jaake fail ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the stigma cue by restating the fear of being mocked without challenging it, ending with a soft pause.
text: As a son sari zimmedari akele uthane ka yeh pressure aur fail hone ka stigma tumhe aur bhi zyada andar tak ghutan mehsoos karwa raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Bilkul akele pad gaya hoon is bade shehar mein. Rone ka control nahi ho raha kyunki koi rasta nahi dikh raha. EMI recovery walo ki calls aana shuru ho jayengi kal se. Office mein system ke samne kaise baithunga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question after consecutive restatements to see how they currently manage the overwhelming thoughts of office and recovery calls.
text: Jab yeh bank ke recovery calls ka darr aur office mein sab normal dikhane ka pressure ek sath dimaag par padta hai, tab tum is akelepan mein khud ko kaise sambhalte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kahan sambhal pata hoon, bas aise hi bed pe baitha rehta hoon blank hoke. Is deep despair ne mujhe andar se khokhla kar diya hai. Mujhe lagta hai main papa ka ek accha beta nahi ban paya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep exhaustion that comes from the financial burden and the duty to be a good son (C4/C5 + Duty_Based exhaustion mapping).
text: Mujhe aisa lag raha hai ki ek achha beta banne ki koshish karte karte, aur is medical bills aur EMI ke akele bojh ko uthate uthate tum poori tarah se thak chuke ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak gaya hoon yaar. Sach mein bahut thak gaya hoon. Pata nahi kitne mahino se continuously pehle aspatal ke chakkar, phir job ka target aur ab ye bank ka defaulter tag.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their feeling of despair as culturally and situationally normal, while separating their worth from their bank balance.
text: Ek taraf bimari ka lamba kharcha aur dusri taraf Metro city mein EMI ka pressure, in dono ka ek sath aana kisi ki bhi himmat tod sakta hai. Tumhara despair mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai, aur yeh current zero balance tumhari ek bete ke roop mein value ko define nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho par reality toh yahi hai ki savings khatam hain. Gaon ki zameen bachegi ya bikegi, ye pressure hamesha mere dimag mein chalta rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalise the issue among IT professionals from rural backgrounds.
text: IT professionals mein aur shehar aake kaam karne walo mein aspatal ke achanak kharchon ki wajah se EMI debt mein phasna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki corporate aur society ki expectation ka bojh lene se sab darte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan yaar, kisi coworker ko bata bhi toh nahi sakta, corporate world mein weakness dikhana matlab apna hi appraisal kharab karwana. Sabke samne sab theek hone ki acting karni padti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the burden of maintaining a perfect facade in a competitive corporate environment.
text: Office ke us competitive environment mein jahan sab consistently perfect perform karne ki ummeed karte hain, wahan roz ye smile rakh ke akele apni pareshani chhupana ek alag hi ladaai ban jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Wahi ladaai akele ladte ladte main breakdown ho gaya tha. Ab thoda saans aayi hai aapse baat karke. Rone ka control nahi ho raha tha us waqt... par kal office aur bank toh jaana hi hoga. Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, immediate grounding exercises to help settle the physiological overwhelm before tackling the bank issue.
text: Tumne itni der akele is despair ko bardasht kiya hai, yeh tumhari strength dikhata hai. Abhi kal ki kal dekhenge, dimaag ko shant karne ke liye hum do choti cheezein kar sakte hain: ya toh tum ek glass paani peekar 5 minute apni balcony mein open hawa mein khade ho sakte ho, ya phir bas phone screen se door hat kar thodi der shanti se saans le sakte ho. Inme se kya theek lag raha hai abhi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Balcony wala theek lag raha hai. Band room mein screen aur bank ka portal dekh dekh kar hi ajeeb sa suffocating feel hone laga tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking the Seeker step-by-step through the selected suggestion to bring immediate grounding.
text: Pehle yeh karo… uth kar ek glass pani piyo… phir balcony mein jao aur wahan bahar ki aawazon par thoda dhyan do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye dimaag ko relax karne do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main balcony mein aa gaya hoon. Hawa thandi lag rahi hai chehre par. Screen se aankh hati toh dimaag ki woh sunn hone wali feeling thodi kam hui.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the financial crisis as a structural flaw (medical spiral) rather than a personal failure.
text: Is physical space se thoda cut off hona zaruri hota hai aisi state mein. Yaad rakhna ki health emergencies ki wajah se medical expense spiral ban jana ek system ka gap hai, yeh tumhari financial planning ya mehnat ki galti nahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye sach hai, maine EMI time pe hi pay ki hai hamesha, par bills medical cover ke bahar chale gaye the jab papa admit the. Usi gap ne aaj ye din dikhaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the prolonged duration of the struggle since the insurance claim.
text: Us pehle insurance claim aane ke din se lekar aaj is bounce tak, har mahine balance maintain karna lagatar ek bohot lambi jung ban gaya hai tumhare liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lambi jung toh hai par mujhe is se nikalna padega. Main bank manager se baat kar sakta hoon kal office jaate waqt, shayad wo thoda time dede ya EMI restructure ka koi rasta nikal aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from helplessness to taking control as they plan their interaction with the bank.
text: Bank manager se EMI restructure ki baat karne ka plan soch kar lagta hai ki tumhare andar ka darr ab thoda chhat raha hai aur tum apne upar thoda control wapas mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pura control toh nahi par ek choti si umeed bani hai. Gaon aur papa ke baare mein soch kar darr abhi bhi lagta hai, par agar bank ne extra time de diya toh main overtime karke sab manage kar loonga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting how the relational connection (thinking of their father) fuels their determination.
text: Papa ka khayal abhi bhi darr paida karta hai, lekin uske bawajood tum unhi ki khatir yeh overtime aur struggle karne ki himmat juta rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Karna hi padega, wo asha ki kiran hain mere liye. Gaon ka kisan kabhi fasal kharab hone par mitti nahi chhodta, ye unhi ne sikhaya tha bachpan mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their duty and the values instilled by their father.
text: Bete hone ka farz aur kisan baap ki wahi seekh aaj tumhe is debt ke tufaan mein bhi bina haar maane khada rehne ki sikh de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rone ka control nahi ho raha
text: Sahi kaha. Shuru mein lag raha tha rone ka control nahi ho raha aur main surrender kar chuka tha. Par ab rone se kaam nahi banega. Kal thoda strongly approach karna padega HR ko bhi advance ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a second systemic reframe about banking mechanics to reduce the shame of a bounced EMI.
text: Yeh himmat ki baat hai. EMI bounce hone par system auto-messages bhej kar aisa banata hai ki aadmi khud ko akela samjhe, par sach yeh hai ki bank aur HR ke paas aise exceptions handle karne ke options hamesha hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you mujhe theek waqt par is panic se nikalne ke liye. Main us gehre despair me dub gaya tha, par ab kal ki strategy aur options dimaag mein saaf dikh rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their resilience and bringing closure to the conversation.
text: Yeh tumhari apni andruni taqat hai jisne is mushkil waqt mein naya rasta dhoondh liya. Itne ghutan ke baad bhi bank aur HR se baat karne ka practically sochna sach mein taarif ke kabil hai, hamesha yaad rakhna ki is struggle mein tum akele nahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bhai, aaj achanak sadak pe chalte chalte dimaag itna sunn ho gaya ki main wahi kinare pe baith gaya. Mujhse utha hi nahi ja raha hai yahan se. Bas andar ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai jisme main khota ja raha hoon. Sharam aur bechaini itni zyada hai ki khud se hi aankh nahi mila pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the intense feeling of emotional overwhelm and paralysis without digging for facts yet.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki yeh achanak aayi ghabrahat aur bhaari sharam tumhe poori tarah se apni giraft mein le chuki hai, aur tum ek ajeeb se andhere mein akele doobte ja rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan yaar, bilkul waisa hi. Metro city mein akela pada hoon aur ye jo zillat wali feeling hai na, wo andar tak kha rahi hai mujhe. Phir se wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai, jahan koi backup ya umeed nahi dikh rahi aage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of being completely stuck and hopeless in an alienating environment.
text: Is akelepan aur zillat ke bojh ke beech, yeh darr sabse bada lag raha hai ki aage ka koi raasta nahi bacha aur is bhari sannate se nikalne ki koi umeed bhi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Umeed kahan bachi hai? Asli baat bataun toh aaj bank se call aaya tha ki mera personal loan default ho gaya hai. Wo jo mummy ke hospital bills ke liye liya tha, ab pay hi nahi ho raha. EMI bounce ka darr ab sach ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty-based role of a son trying to handle medical bills, which has now turned into a crisis.
text: Apni mummy ke ilaaj ke liye ek zimmedar bete ka farz nibhate hue tumne yeh loan liya, aur ab wahi zimmedari ek default ban kar tumhare dimaag par bohot bhari pad rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sahi kaha, farz toh poora kiya par ab meri haalat kharab hai. Company mein bhi layoff chal raha hai, aur ab HR ya boss ko mera loan default pata chala toh office mein izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Yehi soch ke ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai dobara.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational fear of losing respect and standing among peers at work.
text: Office mein sabke saamne yeh baat khulne aur apni banayi hui professional izzat chali jane ka darr tumhe apne logon se kaat kar aur bhi akela kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Yahan waise bhi koi apna nahi hai. Sab colleagues hain bas. Kisi ko bataunga toh judge karenge ki IT mein hoke bhi kaise default kar diya. Sab bolenge ki manage nahi karna aata, I feel like a complete failure.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue with a shorter restatement focusing on duration/isolation, ending with a soft pause.
text: Itne dino se yahan sabke beech yeh 'failure' ka title lagne ka bojh akele chup chap uthana...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sach mein yaar, bahut thak gaya hoon ye sab chhupate hue. Roz office jaana mask pehen ke, EMI ka tension lena, bank recovery walo ke unknown calls se darna... meri capacity khatam ho chuki hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the unexpressed deep exhaustion of carrying both duty and systemic distress alone.
text: Lagta hai ki ghar walon ki zimmedari aur yahan city mein apni izzat bacha ke rakhne ki is lambi ladaai mein, tum andar se bilkul exhaust ho chuke ho aur ab aur sehne ki himmat nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Poori tarah se exhaust ho chuka hoon. Kabhi kabhi toh thoughts aate hain ki sab chhod chaad ke kahin gayab ho jaun taaki ye agents mujhe dhund na sakein. Raat ko dhang se soye hue mahino ho gaye hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk thought gently, then normalize falling into debt in metro cities due to medical bills.
text: Jab charo taraf se dabaav padta hai toh sab chhod kar gayab ho jane ka khayal aana akelepan mein bohot natural hai. Lekin metro cities mein hospital ke bhari kharchon ki wajah se aache kamane walo ka bhi aise financial trap mein phas jana ek bohot aam sachai hai, isme tumhara koi personal failure nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Thanks yaar, ye sun kar thoda sa bojh kam laga. Par sach bataun toh samajh nahi aa raha ki ye call walo se deal kaise karun. Wo dhamki de rahe hain contact list walo ko phone karne ki. Ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai unki dhamkiyan yaad karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of the contacts being called.
text: Contacts walon tak baat pahunchne ka yeh seedha threat tumhara darr aur bada raha hai, kyunki isse office aur rishtedari dono jagah izzat jaane ka risk ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Exactly wahi darr hai! Agar unhone boss ya HR ko call kar diya toh main kahin muh dikhane layak nahi rahunga. I want to handle this legally, mujhe is loop se nikalne ka koi raasta dikhao, please tell me ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote from the metro/corporate world to completely break the stigma of default.
text: Corporate duniya mein kai aise IT professionals aur colleagues hain jo achanak medical emergencies aane par EMI defaults ke chakkar mein phanse hain—yeh sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin job mein izzat ke darr se koi open up hokar is par bolta nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Matlab I am actually not the only one? Chalo is baat se thodi toh tasalli hui ki I'm not crazy. But seriously batao yaar, in aate hue calls ki bechaini ko rokne ke liye main abhi foran kya try kar sakta hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 quick, doable options to manage the immediate panic of recovery calls.
text: Hum abhi do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Pehla, abhi ke liye apne phone ko 15 minute 'Do Not Disturb' par daal do taki lagataar ringing ka panic ruke. Doosra, baad mein aaram se bank ka official customer care email nikal kar rakh lo bina unhe abhi reply kiye. Kya inme se koi ek option theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Phone ko DND par daalna better option lag raha hai. Ring bajte hi mujhe panic attack aata hai. Agar aaram se email dhundh liya toh at least call walo ke mu nahi lagna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through putting the phone on DND.
text: Pehle DND setting on kar lo aur phone ki screen ko ulta karke apne se thodi door rakh do... phir aaram se wahan sadak se uth kar kisi chai tapri ya bench par baith jao... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Kar diya ulta phone. Aur ek bench pe aake baith gaya hoon metro station ke paas. Thoda sa dimaag thanda hua hai. Par ye recovery agent system kitna ghatiya hai na, seedha harass karte hain criminals ki tarah.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe to show the harassment is a tactic, not his personal fault.
text: Banking system aur unki third-party recovery ka poora process purposely logon ko daraane aur dabaav banane ke liye hi design hota hai. Unka yeh aggressive aur ghatiya bartaav ek structural tactic hai, yeh tumhari kisi personal galti ya nakami ki wajah se nahi ho raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Main hamesha isko apni izzat aur ego se jod kar dekhta tha. Jaise unki gaaliyan meri hi financial bewakoofi ka nateeja hain. 'I earn well, how can I be broke?' yahi soch soch ke dimaag fat raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his duty-based role realization that he was blaming himself for a systemic issue.
text: Apne aap ko hamesha ek self-sufficient aur responsible professional manne ki wajah se, is system ke dabaav ko tumne poori tarah se apni personal aur duty ki nakami samajh liya tha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Haan bilkul aisa hi tha. Maa ke bills dekhte hi saari savings khatam ho gayi aur main trap mein fans gaya. Ab realise ho raha hai ki emergency kabhi bhi kisi pe bhi aa sakti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational warmth of what the loan actually represented (love for his mother).
text: Maa ke liye sab kuch daaw par lagana aur unka khayal rakhna tumhara pyaar tha, aur is ehsaas ko mante hi khud se wo gussa aur narazgi thodi kam hoti dikh rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Gussa toh bilkul shant ho gaya hai. Ab khud ko un agents ki tarah ek 'fraud' nahi samajh raha. At least wo ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha tha jo subah se, wo gayab hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of moving from the morning's panic to the present calm.
text: Subah ke us bhari andhere aur darr se lekar is bench par baithe hue ab tak ke is safar mein, tumne khud ko judge karna band karke ek bada bojh halka kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Sach mein bahut halka feel ho raha hai. Main kal office se time nikal kar directly branch jaunga aur officially restructuring ki application dunga. Chhupne ka koi fayda nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence turning into a proactive challenge.
text: Bina wajah aur un agents ki dhamkiyon se darr kar chhupne ke badle, ab aamne-saamne jaakar bank se clear baat karne ka yeh faisla ek nayi himmat dikha raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Himmat toh dikhani padegi. Maine kisi ke paise churaye nahi hain, maa ke liye liya tha. Unko clear email daalunga ki harassment tolerate nahi karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror his duty-based confidence returning as he realizes he's a valid customer, not a fraud.
text: Ek fraud na hone ka tumhara yeh sachcha self-belief aur niyyat ka saaf hona, tumhe ab wapas control de raha hai taaki tum apni sharton par unse professionally deal kar sako.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Yes, absolutely. Aur shayad main apni manager ko bhi informally brief kar dunga ki aise koi verification calls aaye toh she knows the context. Chhupa kar main hi overthink kar raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational shift from avoiding coworkers to taking them into confidence.
text: Doston ya colleagues se darr kar unse katne ke badle, ab apne manager ko samne se confidence mein lene ka yeh kadam, office mein bhi us badnami ke darr ko jad se khatam kar dega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: I feel so much better now. Mujhe toh subah lag raha tha I won't even survive today. Bas wahi ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha tha, but ab thodi clarity aa gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the emotional shift from overwhelming panic to a cleared state of mind.
text: Us bechaini aur ghutan wale andhere ka ekdum se shant ho jana aur dimaag mein aage ka rasta saaf ho jana, apne aap mein bohot aaram dene wala ehsaas hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: ek gehra sannata mehsus ho raha hai
text: Bohat jyada aaram mila hai bhai. Thank you sunne ke liye. Ab main nikalta hoon yahan se, room jaake aaram karunga, kal se baaki sab ek ek karke sort out karte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of the long struggle ending with him finally heading home for some rest.
text: Aaj ke is thak dene wale aur bhari toofan se bhare din ke baad, aaram se uth kar wapas apne room ki taraf kadam badhana sach mein ek nayi shuruaat jaisa hai. Take care.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Pata nahi kya ho raha hai, bas lagatar dum ghutne laga hai mera. Andar se bilkul breakdown kar gaya hoon aur dimaag blank hai. Aisa panic ho raha hai jaise sab kuch mere hathon se phisal jayega aur main kuch nahi kar paunga is emotional flooding mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens F strictly as required for Sequential Coping to mirror the overwhelming feeling of panic and losing control, without probing for the stressor yet.
text: Aise achanak se sab kuch bikharne ka ehsaas hona sach mein bahut ghabrahat paida karta hai, lagta hai ki aapke andar darr ki aisi lehar uth rahi hai jismein aap khud ko bebus mehsoos kar rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Haan, sans rukk rahi hai meri darr ke maare. Rona aa raha hai aur samajh nahi aa raha ki khud ko kaise sambhalun. Main hamesha ghar ka sab bojh akele sambhal leta tha, par is baar dimaag blank hai poori tarah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration and contrast in his role (Lens D) to validate how hard it is for someone who usually manages everything to suddenly feel entirely broken.
text: Jo insaan hamesha se har mushkil akele sambhalta aaya ho, uske liye achanak is lamhe mein khud ko itna toota hua mehsoos karna aur bhi zyada takleefdeh hota hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Asal mein pichle mahine bhai ke accident mein meri saari jama-poonji chali gayi. Hospital mein din raat ek karke kisi tarah usko bachaya... par ab lag raha hai is naye bojh se main nahi bach paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational sacrifice (Lens C) as the stressor begins to surface, validating his dedication to his brother.
text: Apne bhai ki jaan bachane ke liye aapne apna sab kuch dao par laga diya, aur ab us jimmedari ka poora wazan aapko andar se tod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Upar se gaon mein sahukaar ka karz pehle se chal raha tha. Aaj subah bank ka EMI bounce alert dekh kar mera dum ghutne laga. Agar kist nahi bhari toh ghar walo ko kya bolunga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence (Lens E) of facing his family over the missed payments, honoring the full context of his financial crisis.
text: Bhai ke ilaaj ke kharche aur pehle ke karz ke baad, yeh bank ka naya notification is darr ko aur badha raha hai ki parivar walon ke saamne yeh sthiti kaise chhupai jayegi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakta na ki bank wale notice bhejenge. Biradari mein kya izzat reh jayegi agar logon ko pata chala ki main family ka dhyan nahi rakh pa raha. Bahut sharam aati hai ye soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Applied stigma protocol: a short restatement (Lens B) focusing on the heavy burden of social standing, ending with a soft pause.
text: Samaj ki is izzat aur badnami ke dar ke beech apni aisi halat sabse chhipana sach mein bahut bhari padta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut zyada bhari pad raha hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai is breakdown se achha hai ki main hi na rahun. Kam se kam ye roz ka panic aur notification ka darr toh khatam ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Activated moderate risk flag protocol strictly using Lens F to validate the heavy emotional exhaustion, followed by the mandatory safety question.
text: Is roz-roz ki ghutan aur lagatar badhte ja rahe karz ke bojh se hamesha ke liye chhutkara paane ka khayal aana, itni gehri thakan ka nateeja hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main theek hoon. Aisa kuch karunga nahi kyunki mere baad bhai aur bacchon ka kya hoga. Bas dimaag itna thak gaya hai soch soch kar ki koi rasta nahi milta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a question after two successful restatements and clearing the safety check to gently explore what part of the exhaustion is most paralyzing.
text: Apne bacchon aur bhai ke liye jeene ka yeh jazba waqai bahut gehri himmat dikhata hai... par abhi is waqt, is thakan mein sabse zyada pareshaan karne wali baat konsi hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Sabse pareshaan karne wali baat yeh helplessness hai. Main is ghar ka bada beta hoon, sab mujh par depend karte hain. Aur main ek EMI nahi chuka pa raha. Dimaag blank hai ki paise kahan se aayenge ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the unspoken exhaustion mapping to the breadwinner role clashing with the sequential overwhelming burden.
text: Lagta hai ki is 'bade bete' ki jimmedari ko nibhaate-nibhaate, aur sabka sahara bante-bante, aap khud itni buri tarah thak chuke hain jahan apko apni hi majboori par ghutan mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Main andar se completely drain ho chuka hoon. Ek machine ki tarah bas kaam kar raha tha saalo se, par ab machine mein tel hi nahi bacha hai. Sahukaar ko muh dikhane se darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his deep exhaustion as culturally expected given the heavy economic burden, separating his self-worth from the missed EMI.
text: Is akelepan aur thakan ko itni gehrai se mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai jab aap par itna bada aarthik bojh aur sahukaar ka darr dono ho. Apne parivar ke liye apna sab kuch de dena aapki mehnat aur lagan ko darshata hai, aur ek bounce alert aapke wajood ko kamzor saabit nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh aapki sahi hai, par reality toh wahi hai ki abhi jeb mein paise nahi hain. Aise mein kabhi kabhi bathroom mein rona aata hai chup chup ke taaki bacche na dekh lein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used self-disclosure to normalize the systemic pattern of male breadwinners hiding their tears and financial stress to protect their families.
text: Ghar ke mukhiya ya breadwinner role mein yeh saara stress akele pee jana aur chup kar rona bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein ummeed ki jati hai ki 'mard kabhi toot-te nahi' aur unhe sab akele hi jhelna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye bina toote sab akele jhelne ke chakkar mein hi toh aadhi jaan chali gayi. Bas ab samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aap hi batao ki is EMI aur sahukaar wale chakkar se kaise nipatun? Koi toh rasta hoga nikalne ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two concrete, quick actionable steps to manage the immediate threat of the bounced EMI without adding new financial obligations.
text: Abhi ke liye do chhote kadam soch sakte hain. Ek, apne bank ke customer care ko phone karke bhai ki medical emergency ka hawala dekar EMI grace period ki request karna, ya doosra, filhal sirf sahukaar ko phone karke byaaj chukane ke liye thode waqt ki maang karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahukaar se zyada samay maangna theek nahi hoga, wo aur dabayega. Bank mein baat karna theek rahega. Par customer care wale kya meri baat sunenge bina kisi fine lagaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked the Seeker step-by-step through the process of contacting the bank, keeping the task small and manageable for the day.
text: Pehle ek paper par bank ka toll-free number aur apna loan account number likh kar rakh lo... phir kal subah shanti se unhe call karke accident ki situation aur medical emergency samjhao... bas itna hi aaj ke liye plan karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ye main kar sakta hoon. Medical papers aur hospital ke bill bhi hain mere paas proof ke liye. Shayad unko dekh kar woh fine hata dein aur thoda waqt de dein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe on banking grace periods to relieve his internal sense of failure and normalize the process.
text: Bankings system mein medical emergencies ke liye grace period aur penalty waiver ke pravdhan hote hain, yeh ek standard aarthik prakriya hai kisi insaan ki zaati vifalta nahi. Aksar log aisi suvidhaon ki jankari na hone ki wajah se poora bojh khud uthate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Acha, mujhe lagta tha bas danda leke ghar notice bhej denge seedha. Thodi si relief mili hai ye jankari sunkar. Par wo sahukaar ka kya karoon, uska soch ke darr vahi ka vahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored his ongoing sense of duty (Lens B), recognizing that he is still carrying the weight of multiple financial responsibilities.
text: Aap lagatar har jimmedari ko poora karne ki koshish kar rahe hain, jahan ek taraf bank ki kist ka tension thoda kam hua hai toh dusri taraf sahukaar ka byaaj ek bhari bojh bana hua hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag blank hai
text: Ji bilkul. Pata hai, sach bolun toh dimaag blank hai jab sahukaar ki baat aati hai kyu ki wo log seedhe muh baat nahi karte. Unhe bas apna paisa chahiye hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence (Lens E) regarding the aggressive nature of local money lenders.
text: Un logon ke bartav aur dhamkane wale tareeke se samna hone ka yeh khayal hi andar ek aisi bebasi paida kar deta hai jahan aage ka koi rasta nahi dikhta...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Par ab lag raha hai ki main saari pareshani ek din mein solve nahi kar sakta. Pehle bank wala matter kal settle karne ki koshish karunga, phir dekhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the shift in focus and boundaries (Lens D), acknowledging his choice to pace the problem-solving over time instead of all at once.
text: Itne bade bawandar mein aapne badi samajhdari se aane wale dino ka bojh bant kar, aaj apna dhyaan sirf ek mumkin kaam par laga liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aakhir mere bhai ki jaan bach gayi, yahi sabse badi jama-poonji hai filhal mere liye. Paise toh shayad dheere dheere chuka hi dunga main apni mehnat se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational core (Lens C) of his resilience, validating that his brother's survival is his true wealth.
text: Kuch der pehle ka woh achanak aaya darr ab is ehsaas mein badal gaya hai ki aapke paas aapke bhai ke roop mein sabse keemti cheez mehfooz hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, panic sach mein kaafi kam hua hai ab. Abhi dum nahi ghut raha pehle jaisa. Aapse ye saari baatein khul kar share karke waqai himmat mili mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored his duty-bound nature (Lens B), highlighting the quiet strength it takes to keep pushing forward despite the odds.
text: Is mushkil waqt mein bhi aap jis tarah apne parivar ki suraksha ko dhyan mein rakh kar hal nikalne ki taraf badh rahe hain, yeh sach mein aapki taqat dikhata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ab jaldi se so jana chahta hoon thodi der ke liye. Kal bada din hoga, bank ke papers nikalne aur calls wagera karne mein subah se lag jana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggested a highly accessible, comforting physical action for immediate relief before sleep, aligning with his exhausted state.
text: Aane wala kal lamba ho sakta hai, toh kya abhi sone se pehle ek pal ruk kar thoda sa paani peena aur do ghadi shanti se khud ko aaram dena theek rahega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul, main bas ek glass pani peeyunga aur lights off karke so jaunga. Apni family ke liye mujhe strong aur healthy rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational frame (Lens C) one last time to validate that taking care of himself tonight is an act of love for his family.
text: Apni family ke liye khud ko thoda waqt dena aur aaj raat is thehrav ke sath shanti se so jana, aapka unke prati sabse bada pyar aur support hai...
